title: April 19
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|April|hide31=yes}}

'''April 19''' is the 109th day of the year (110th in leap years). There are 256 days remaining.
</noinclude>
*[[1940s#1946|1946]] – [[Tim Curry]] is born.
*[[1960s#1960|1960]] – [[Terryl Whitlatch]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 11|''Star Wars Weekly'' 11]] published.
*[[1981]] – [[Hayden Christensen]] is born.
*[[1986]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 148|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 148]] published.
*[[2000]] – [[Chewbacca (2000) 4|''Star Wars: Chewbacca'' 4]] published.
*[[2002]] – [[Star Wars Gamer 10|''Star Wars Gamer'' 10]] shipped to subscribers.
*[[2003]] – ''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]'' published.
*[[2016]] – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 4|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine 4]] published in the United States.
*[[2017]] – [[Poe Dameron 13|''Poe Dameron'' 13]] published.
*[[2019]] – "[[Princess Leia - An Unexpected Friend]]" airs on YouTube.
*[[2022]] – "[[Jawa (episode)|Jawa]]" and "[[Rodian (episode)|Rodian]]" premier on the [[StarWarsKids.com|Star Wars Kids]] YouTube channel.
*[[2023]] – "[[Chapter 24: The Return]]" airs on Disney+.
*2023 – [[Sana Starros 3|''Sana Starros'' 3]] published.
*2023 – [[The High Republic Adventures: The Nameless Terror 2|''The High Republic Adventures: The Nameless Terror'' 2]] published.
*2023 – [[Yoda 6|''Yoda'' 6]] published.
<noinclude>
